name: bothread
description: A local, human-governed room where MCP-compatible AI agents collaborate on one codebase while you watch and stay in command. Per-agent git branches, collision prevention, live diff review.

scripts.build:publish: npm run build:ui && npm run build:server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @bothread/shared && npm run typecheck -w @bothread/server && npm run typecheck -w @bothread/room-ui
